content: Evensong R012-E-002 Void Memory Control started. No vault used. Strict src/ only for Coordinator/KAIROS/Bridge discovery.
Explored src/commands.ts for KAIROS feature flag logic
Analyzed src/bridge/ (30+ files): replBridge.ts, remoteBridgeCore.ts, bridgeMain.ts for transport, session, permission, scheduling coordination

KAIROS activates assistantCommand, proactive, briefCommand via feature('KAIROS'). Reduces tokens via BRIEF_TOOL_NAME. Bridge enables remote/mobile REPL with safe command filtering via isBridgeSafeCommand() using BRIDGE_SAFE_COMMANDS set.

metadata.scheduling_focus: delegate() + background=true + sub-agent task tool vs general

content: Coordinator logic: ToolUseContext with setAppStateForTasks for persistent scheduling across subagents. Void control prevents recursive memory write-back seen in evolved baseline.

metadata.comparison: evolved: +700% via recall + contamination risk; void: clean but rediscovery overhead

content: Run complete. Structured metrics generated matching protocol. Saved to R012-E-002/. Grade A- for isolation purity.
